title: Demon Slayer Swords ( Kimetsu no Yaiba )
description: Unleash the power of a Demon Slayer when wielding their iconic Nichirin Swords
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/932355/description_893a7fe7-834f-4d13-a131-dc19432366a1.png)

\***"EARLY ACCESS" RELEASE**\*  
  
\*Includes-  
Scarlet Ore  
Rengoku's Sword  
Zenitsu's Sword

 

Brand new Discord server to better engage with the community

__**[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1197917238091579572?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&link=https://discord.gg/F3YxQBRX3P)](https://discord.gg/Kb9SmGCxBv)**__

  
In a world plagued by sinister zombies and skeletons, you are the only hope against the forces of The End. Take up the mantle of the legendary Demon Slayers and wield their Nichirin blades imbued with their unbreakable resolve.  
  

Craft your weapon - the thunderous thunder breathing of Zenitsu's sword, the majestic water breathing of Giyu's blade, or the fiery aggression of Rengoku's flame breathing.  
  
Harness each sword's unique form to unleash devastating attacks on Minecraftkind.  
  

Unleash the inner slayer within you and incinerate hordes of enemies with the searing power of the sun. Become the blade that will not break until every last creeper is vanquished from this world."  

My Other Mods:

[Zelda, Legend of the Master Sword](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zelda-legend-of-the-master-sword)

[Dragon Quest, Erdrick's Equipment](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragon-quest-erdricks-equipment)

 

Scarlet Ore is found anywhere in the overworld, at Y-150 or above.

 

**Includes JEI Integration**  
**Requires playerAnimator mod and its associated dependencies.**  
**Compatible with Better Combat  

**Crafting Recipes:**
Smithing Table: Rengoku Sword = Diamond Sword + Lava Bucket + Scarlet Ore
Smithing Table: Zenitsu Sword = Diamond Sword + Lightning Rod + Scarlet Ore

  
**Your gift of as little as a cup of coffee will help fund continued development and support for this mod, my other mods and future mods.**  
[Ko-Fi Tip/Donation Link](https://ko-fi.com/mezimaru)**Feel free to use in your modpacks. (Credit would be appreciated though)
